summary: Executed backend pytest + frontend Playwright regression for grading filters/grouping, bulk grading persistence, linked material-assignment navigation, reset password, assignment attachments, download auth modes, blue mobile UI, frontend build, and backend lint.
action_items: Optional cleanup: resolve React Hook dependency warnings in App.js useEffect blocks to keep frontend build warning-free.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend lint initially failed due an unused import in test_unified_login_enrollment_deadline_settings.py; fixed with no functional impact.
Frontend production build succeeds but still reports two react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings (non-blocking).
seed_data_creation: Created transient test entities via API/UI: test students, assignments, submissions, and assignment attachments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 validated all requested revised features on public URL. Student attachment visibility is confirmed when student belongs to class of assignment with attachments; links include token query. Mobile admin nav works at 390x844 with no page-level horizontal overflow.
rca of the issue: No functional regression found in requested scope. Apparent missing student attachment in an earlier broad run was dataset-scope mismatch (student not enrolled in the assignment class), not a feature defect.
